items.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
items.standfirst: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were married as they celebrated their wedding with hundreds of guests Friday at Madison Square Garden in New York City.
items.content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were married as they celebrated their wedding with hundreds of guests Friday at Madison Square Garden in New York City.

items.title: Dior dress, Adam Sandler and a man of honour: What we know about Taylor and Travis's wedding
items.standfirst: The couple tied the knot in New York on Friday, after months of speculation about when, where and how it would happen.
items.content: The couple tied the knot in New York on Friday, after months of speculation about when, where and how it would happen.

items.title: Pop star Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce at Madison Square Garden
items.standfirst: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married Friday night at Madison Square Garden, where actor Adam Sandler was the surprising officiant at a ceremony and Stevie Nicks performed among a crowd packed with stars of sports and entertainment.
items.content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married Friday night at Madison Square Garden, where actor Adam Sandler was the surprising officiant at a ceremony and Stevie Nicks performed among a crowd packed with stars of sports and entertainment.

items.content: The couple tied the knot in a star-studded ceremony officiated by comedian Adam Sandler at Madison Square Garden.

items.title: Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce in NYC ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
items.standfirst: The star-studded celebration saw several streets in Midtown Manhattan shut, as hordes of fans gathered outside the arena.
items.content: The star-studded celebration saw several streets in Midtown Manhattan shut, as hordes of fans gathered outside the arena.

items.title: After weeks of speculation, Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce wed in New York
items.standfirst: Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed on Friday, as dozens of black cars dropped off elegantly dressed guests outside of Madison Square Garden in New York City. The wedding bash is expected to last into Saturday morning.
items.content: Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed on Friday, as dozens of black cars dropped off elegantly dressed guests outside of Madison Square Garden in New York City. The wedding bash is expected to last into Saturday morning. (Image credit: Charly Triballeau)

clusters.title: Major Ukrainian drone attack on Russia strikes St Petersburg oil terminal
clusters.neutral_headline: Ukrainian drones attack Russian oil terminal

items.title: Major Ukrainian drone attack on Russia strikes St Petersburg oil terminal
items.standfirst: Ukrainian drones have struck an oil terminal and port in St Petersburg and the surrounding region, Russian and Ukrainian officials say.
items.content: Ukrainian drones have struck an oil terminal and port in St Petersburg and the surrounding region, Russian and Ukrainian officials say.

items.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg oil terminal and nearby port
items.standfirst: St Petersburg governor reports no victims after ‘large-scale’ overnight attack that also hit Baltic port of VysotskUkraine launched a big overnight drone attack on St Petersburg and the surrounding area, hitting the city’s oil terminal and port infrastructure in the wider region.The St Petersburg governor, Alexander Beglov, said the city had been subjected to a “large-scale” drone attack that had hit its oil terminal. He said there were no casualties and the aftermath of the attack had been dealt with. Continue reading...
items.content: St Petersburg governor reports no victims after ‘large-scale’ overnight attack that also hit Baltic port of VysotskUkraine launched a big overnight drone attack on St Petersburg and the surrounding area, hitting the city’s oil terminal and port infrastructure in the wider region.The St Petersburg governor, Alexander Beglov, said the city had been subjected to a “large-scale” drone attack that had hit its oil terminal. He said there were no casualties and the aftermath of the attack had been dealt with. Continue reading...

items.title: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
items.standfirst: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".
items.content: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".

ai_summary: Ukrainian drones struck an oil terminal in St Petersburg

clusters.title: Curtis Young on America's "diffcult moment in the mirror"
clusters.neutral_headline: US marks 250 years since Declaration adoption

items.title: Curtis Young on America's "diffcult moment in the mirror"
items.standfirst: This weekend, the United States marks 250 years since the adoption of the Declaration of Independence, one of the most influential political texts in modern history. Its assertion that governments derive their power from the consent of the governed, and that all people are endowed with the rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness, has inspired democratic movements around the world.
items.content: This weekend, the United States marks 250 years since the adoption of the Declaration of Independence, one of the most influential political texts in modern history. Its assertion that governments derive their power from the consent of the governed, and that all people are endowed with the rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness, has inspired democratic movements around the world.

items.title: On the Declaration of Independence
items.standfirst: A July 4 reflection on the Declaration’s radical language and global significance, arguing that its claims about equality, unalienable rights, consent of the governed, and the right to alter or abolish unjust government helped reshape modern politics far beyond the United States. [acoup.blog]
items.content: A July 4 reflection on the Declaration’s radical language and global significance, arguing that its claims about equality, unalienable rights, consent of the governed, and the right to alter or abolish unjust government helped reshape modern politics far beyond the United States. [acoup.blog]

ai_summary: The US marks 250 years since the Declaration of Independence
The document asserts government power comes from the people
The Declaration inspired democratic movements worldwide
It claims all people have rights to life and liberty
The document has global significance and radical language

clusters.title: China's military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks

items.title: China's military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks
items.standfirst: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping.
items.content: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping. (Image credit: Li Gang)

items.title: Xi Replaces Anti-Corruption Leader in Purge of China’s Army
items.standfirst: Chinese President Xi Jinping has appointed a new head of anti-corruption efforts in the armed forces as he continues the country’s biggest military purge in half a century.
items.content: Chinese President Xi Jinping has appointed a new head of anti-corruption efforts in the armed forces as he continues the country’s biggest military purge in half a century.

The move is believed to ensure loyalty to the Communist Party
The purge is an effort to maintain party control
Xi Jinping is leading the military purge efforts
